theme: load-balance packages mailed by a colluding cartel
title: Consignment Sort: Hashing the Cartel's Manifest
strategies: raw mod-B routing: bucket every tracking code by code mod B directly, with no hash parameters at all (reproduces the evaluator's weak reference)

static multiplicative hashing with a fixed power-of-two modulus: pick one large odd multiplier and a table size that is a power of two, reused unchanged for every instance regardless of the actual codes

lattice detection + coprimality certificate: compute the GCD of pairwise code differences to recover the planted batch stride, factor it, and search for a hash modulus that shares no prime factor with it before choosing a coprime multiplier
detection plus local refinement: after picking a coprime modulus, sweep nearby multipliers/shifts and keep whichever minimizes the observed max truck load on the given instance
